case_title: SEYED ARASH ABBASI VS. KELLY SABOROUGH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,900.00 FILED BY ABBASI, SEYED ARASH AS TO DEFENDANT SABOROUGH, KELLY AKA KEL SABAROUH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABBASI, SEYED ARASH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SABOROUGH, KELLY AKA KEL SABAROUH $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,715.00, FOR DEPOSIT NOT RETURNED TO SUB-TENANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ABBASI, SEYED ARASH ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD D/B/A JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE 65.00 SERVED JAN-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SABOROUGH, KELLY AKA KEL SABAROUH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF SEYED ABBASI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RE-ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY RESPONDENT LEE, JAMES LEONARD D/B/A JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST AS TO PLAINTIFF ABBASI, SEYED ARASH
